project_type: MQL5 Expert Advisor + Python trading system for XAUUSD M1 scalping
build_system: pip for Python, MetaEditor for EA (not available in sandbox)
verification_instructions: Run pytest on the tests/ folder. EA MQL5 changes are validated by syntax review only (no MetaEditor available).
environment_constraints: No MetaEditor available for MQL5 compilation. Python 3.9 available. 20 pre-existing test failures in test_bridge.py, test_spread_signal.py, test_tick_collector.py, test_performance.py (encoding issues, unrelated).
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Changes must maintain EA<->Python file bridge protocol compatibility.
key_patterns: Python main.py reads EMA values from EA file (neurox_v9_ema.txt), determines direction, fires signals via bridge.py. EA writes ema9|ema15|max_distance|open_positions|adx to the file. Config.py holds all settings. EA manages trailing stops in NeuroX_Position.mqh with 4-tier progressive system. Tests use pytest fixtures, tmp_path for bridge tests.
directory_structure: Root: main.py (entry), config.py (settings), bridge.py (signal I/O), momentum.py (indicators), trailing_stop.py (Python trailing), tick_collector.py (price reader). Include/: MQL5 modules. tests/: pytest tests.
